## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added / updated and passing (`npm test`)
- [ ] TypeScript passes (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if user-facing change)
- [ ] README updated (if API changed)
